finding: Deployment evidence manifest construction and verification must be one fail-closed operation so an unverified or partially written manifest cannot be uploaded as if it were accepted evidence.

behavior: refuses to overwrite an existing manifest
builds the manifest from the exact required evidence set
immediately re-reads and verifies source commit, workflow run, file membership, sizes, digests, order, and manifest digest
removes the new manifest and throws if verification fails

verification.source_parse: Both module and test passed node --check before commit.
verification.runtime_tests: not executed in trusted checkout or CI during this run
verification.deployment: not attempted because Cloudflare credentials remain externally unconfigured

limits: The authoritative workflow is not yet wired to invoke the finalizer.
No resolving Cloudflare hostname or deployed commit is claimed.
Manifest integrity authenticates bounded artifact bytes and run provenance, not scientific or medical truth.
privacy_boundary: No secret values, private chat, health material, raw request payloads, or account identifiers are persisted.
falsification_route: Delete or mutate any required evidence file before finalization; the finalizer must throw and must not leave a manifest output.
